concerns.text: T001 'Create project structure per implementation plan' lacks concrete deliverable. Specify exact directory tree (e.g., 'Create src/, tests/, data/, docs/ directories with __init__.py files')
T040 'Documentation updates in docs/' is vague. Name specific files to update (e.g., 'Update docs/methods.md with power analysis methodology and motion exclusion rates')

T041 'Code cleanup and refactoring across all analysis modules' has no concrete deliverable. Specify which modules and what refactoring (e.g., 'Refactor src/analysis/*.py to remove duplicate imports and add type hints')
T042 'Performance optimization for NBS permutation testing on 2 cores' lacks measurable target. Specify success criteria (e.g., 'Reduce NBS runtime to <2h on 2 cores for 10 subjects')
T045 'Security hardening for API key handling' is vague. Define specific hardening (e.g., 'Implement .env file validation and key rotation in src/config/env.py')

T046 'Run quickstart.md validation to ensure all FRs are addressed' has no concrete deliverable. Specify output artifact (e.g., 'Generate docs/fr_traceability.md mapping each FR to implementation location')
T021 specifies AAL atlas but spec.md:FR-003 requires Yeo 7-network atlas. Task description must resolve this contradiction before implementation can proceed deterministically
T019 implements post-hoc power analysis per spec, but plan.md specifies a priori power analysis. Task must clarify which approach to implement or split into two tasks
